name: warpwatch
description: A macOS menu-bar dashboard of your Claude Code agents in Warp. One row per tab, named after its task, with a live status (working / finished / needs-input). The menu-bar icon is the Warp logo with a status badge — calm while agents work, a bright badge when a tab wants you — click it to jump straight to the EXACT Warp tab (via warp://session deep links). Plays a sound on finish; optional notification / dialog / auto-focus modes.
